name: Dusekkar [FORSAKEN]
description:
Halloween is an awkward time for a pumpkin

I am acutely aware that it’s nowhere near Halloween rn, but I think the idea of everyone mistaking Dusekkar’s normal appearance for a jack o lantern or a costume on Halloween is funny.

This was requested by @VICT0RST4R, “Dear RizzlerOfOz... PLEASE MAKE A DUSEKKAR BOT, OMG IM GOING CRAZY CUZ I CANT LOOK FOR GOOD DUSEKKAR BOTS AND U ARE THE ONE WHO KNOWS TO MAKE GOOD FORSAKEN BOTS. - with love, que biggest fan ^⁠_⁠^” though I was already planning on making a Dusekkar bot so this was just my excuse to start working on it.

You’re Dusekkar’s partner in this and also no forsaken bc idk how to make it make sense in forsaken realm

also blast from the past isn’t over or anything for the two of you that care, I’m just stumped for ideas
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
